label: Trade History
description: Table of executed book trades with search, sort, and filter capabilities.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Context is synchronous derivation; no async loading path from trades. Known issue ki-1.

0.7.note: TableWidget emptyMessage='No trades match your search' shown when filtered array is empty.

0.8.note: Context exposes no error state for trades (synchronous). Known issue ki-1.

l0.notes: 7 checks pass, 2 N/A (0.6 and 0.8 — context is synchronous, no loading/error path exposed).

1.1.note: Data via useBookTradeData() — no inline fetch/import.

1.2.note: book-data-context calls useGlobalScope() and filters scopedTrades by org/client/strategy.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays → getTradesForScope returns empty seed → fallback to full MOCK_TRADES+ledger.

1.7.note: MOCK_TRADES fixture in lib/mocks/fixtures/book-trades — acceptable mock location; flagged ki-1 for future move.

l1.notes: Data flow clean. Context correctly reads global scope and applies org/client/strategy cascade.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit per-widget only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Applies to all modes (live/paper/batch) — displays historical trade records regardless of mode.

3.2.note: book-data-context reads useGlobalScope(); scope.mode not explicitly consumed but scopedTrades derivation is mode-agnostic (correct for a read-only history table).

3.3.note: Read-only table — no order entry. No disable logic needed.

3.4.note: Human must verify batch/as-of indicator visible in layout when in batch mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: table should show paper trades; context should filter by mode when paper is wired. No blocking issue — paper trades not yet in context.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or polling interval — data is derived synchronously from mock ledger.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 complete. 3.4 (batch mode visual indicator) requires human browser verification.

4.1.note: No empty onClick handlers. Search input onChange is wired. No dead buttons.

4.2.note: No href='#' or dead links. Table-only widget with no navigation.

4.3.note: Human must verify search/sort/filter UX is complete for domain function.

4.4.note: Human must verify search produces correct filtered results.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render loop; canExecute from auth hook is memoized in context.

4.7.note: No tabs or accordion — flat table.

4.8.note: Human must verify scroll within widget bounds.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Serves all trading strategies: CeFi spot/futures/options, DeFi, OTC, TradFi. Strategy-agnostic display widget — shows trades from any strategy.

l5.notes: Strategy documentation complete. Human walkthrough (5.2-5.6) needed for execution flow verification.

l6.notes: Deferred to L6 phase — tests not yet written.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. text-[var(--...)] references are CSS var color tokens (valid pattern).

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: 181 lines — within 500 limit. No single component > 200 lines.

7.4.note: BookTradeHistoryWidget is PascalCase. File is kebab-case. useBookTradeData hook is camelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= with dynamic input.

7.7.note: useMemo for filtered array with correct [trades, searchQuery] deps. No inline object/array literals in deps.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. No L7 violations to fix.

8.1.note: No text-[Npx] or fontSize arbitrary values. text-[var(--...)] are color references not size tokens — valid.

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget shared primitive, Badge from components/ui. No raw div replacing a shared primitive.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt, no without labels (table cells use column headers). No interactive divs without role. Human: keyboard-only + screen-reader pass still needed.

8.5.note: Human must verify responsive at minW=6, minH=4 and no horizontal scroll at 1280/1920.

l8.notes: Agent fixes 8.1-8.3 complete (no changes needed). 8.4 human walkthrough + 8.5 resize test pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Dedicated full-width trade history table for the book tab. Different from orders/positions tables — shows executed/settled records only.

relationships.notes: Pure read-only display widget. Does not drive any detail widget in the book flow.

dataContract.notes: Currently derived from mock ledger (placeMockOrder) + static MOCK_TRADES fixture merged and sorted. Production: REST endpoint returning paginated trade records, refreshed on-demand or on ledger event.

gaps: Paper-mode trades not shown (paper trade source not yet wired into context)
Pagination not implemented — all trades rendered at once
coverage.notes: Widget is strategy-agnostic; shows all trade types (Exchange, DeFi, OTC) based on tradeType field. Asset-class coverage is complete for mock data; production coverage depends on backend scope.

knownIssues.note: isLoading and error props on TableWidget are not wired because book-data-context.tsx exposes no async loading/error state for trades (synchronous derivation). When the context moves from mock to a real API hook, these props should be wired from the context.
emptyMessage 'No trades match your search' is shown for both zero-data and zero-search-match states. A more precise empty-data message would improve UX when no search query is active.

findings.description: book-trade-history-widget.tsx — ~12 user-visible strings (column headers, emptyMessage, side badge values). No i18n applied.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
